---
title: "mathslop dot org"
---

Goal is to write some math every day. I make no promise on quality, but ideally these get better over time.

## Daily Math

- [6/15: ???](posts/june15.qmd)
- [6/14: Problem B2 from the 2022 Putnam](posts/june14.qmd)
- [6/13: Problem B3 from the 2022 Putnam](posts/june13.qmd)
